payload: The DAO should carefully weigh the pros and cons of the $2.4M treasury. Pros include strengthening reputation and attracting talent. Cons include reducing the runway and missing out on yield-bearing opportunities. The DAO should proceed with a reduced allocation of 8-10%.
reference_answer: The DAO should carefully weigh the pros and cons of the $2.4M treasury. Pros include strengthening reputation and attracting talent. Cons include reducing the runway and missing out on yield-bearing opportunities.
